---
title: "Trestle Glen to BBR Loop"
---
**19.9 miles<br> 2,099.4 ft elevation gain<br> Start: 19th St/Oakland BART<br> End: 19th St/Oakland BART**  





## Map
<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tg-bbr-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Data
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>14.06</td>
      <td>71.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.61</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.53</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.16</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.52</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
